title: armeria maritima var. neglecta
intro: Armeria maritima var. neglecta, also known as Sea Thrift or Sea Pink, is a low-growing, perennial plant species that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. neglecta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Armeria maritima var. neglecta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
